title: A Strange Sea Near Jaya
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on the salvage monkeys appear. Masira and the Salvage King crew enter the story as the Straw Hats encounter the rough culture around shipwrecks and treasure hunting.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Salvage Monkeys Appear sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Narrator, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if the rubble buries him,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Had you told Crocodile the truth,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know, I'm not interested...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whether countries and people live or die,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't care less about that.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Then why did you come here?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: All I wanted was to know "History"...

summary: Masira and the Salvage King crew enter the story as the Straw Hats encounter the rough culture around shipwrecks and treasure hunting.
